item.title: My First Pull Request
item.description: I made my first honest-to-goodness pull request today. Minor stuff but I added a feature to the pelican-bootstrap3 theme that allows you to plug images into the sidebar. The original intent was to allow me to add certification marks to my sidebar.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond

item.title: AWS SysOps Administration - Associate
item.description: Last week I took the AWS SysOps Administrator - Associate test and passed with flying colours. Next step will the Developer and then the DevOps certifications, both of which I hope to complete this year. I look forward to doing a lot more work in AWS in the future.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond

item.title: The First Post
item.description: I am absolutely terrible at this blog business, but I’m giving it another whirl. This is intended to be some sort of work / professional experience related info site. I suppose it is really meant to be what would be called a “brag sheet”.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond
